mapper.select: SELECT lv.level_seq AS levelId, lv.level_name AS levelName, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.test_reward AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay, ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, ls.lesson_type AS lessonType FROM learning_level AS lv JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq JOIN learning_lesson AS ls ON ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id WHERE lv.level_seq = #{level_seq} and ch.chapter_id = #{chapter_id}

SELECT lv.level_seq AS levelId, lv.level_name AS levelName, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.test_reward AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay FROM learning_level AS lv JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq WHERE lv.level_seq = #{level_seq} and ch.chapter_id = #{chapter_id}
select level_seq AS levelId, level_name AS levelName from learning_level

select lv.level_seq AS levelId, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, ch.test_reward AS testReward, ch.test_pay AS testPay from learning_level as lv left join learning_chapter as ch on lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq where lv.level_seq = #{level_seq}

select ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, ls.lesson_type AS lessonType from learning_chapter as ch left join learning_lesson as ls on ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id where ch.chapter_id = #{chapter_id}

select result_seq as resultId, lv.level_seq AS levelId, ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, us.lesson_id as lessonId, us.user_seq as userSeq, us.started_at as startDate, us.finished_at as endDate from user_question_result AS us JOIN learning_lesson AS ls ON us.lesson_id = ls.lesson_id JOIN learning_chapter AS ch ON ch.chapter_id = ls.chapter_id JOIN learning_level as lv ON lv.level_seq = ch.level_seq where user_seq = #{user_seq} order by levelId desc, chapterId desc, lessonId desc
select mission_seq AS missionId, mission_type AS type, mission_title AS content, mission_reward AS reward, target_value AS count from mission

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_question_result WHERE DATE_FORMAT(finished_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS lesson,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_test_result WHERE DATE_FORMAT(tested_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS chapterTest,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mock_trade WHERE DATE_FORMAT(traded_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS buyStocks,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_watchlist WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE()) AS watchList FROM DUAL
-- select ch.chapter_id AS chapterId, -- ls.lesson_id AS lessonId, -- ls.lesson_name AS lessonName, -- ls.lesson_type AS lessonType -- from learning_lesson where lesson_id = #{lesson_id}
